Skjøt! Teksting av Nicolai Winther Sir, I am running late for the exam, can you give me permission to sit in the exam place? What is going on Kunal? You are a repeater this year and yet your attendance is 40%? This is the fourth time in the week you are late. On the day of the final exam. Sir, please sir, let me... Sit. Sir, please... Sit down. What is going on? Sir, I was studying till 4 am, sir. Sir, the alarm went't went off, sir, sir, sir, sir. Sir, please. And you expect me to believe that? Seriously, Kunal? Sir, I am not lying. It was the alarm, sir. Sir, please, sir. Stop it, Kunal. You are beyond redemption. Do you know every single faculty member complains about you? You never come to class on time. You are bunking all the time. You haven't even submitted your assignments. Why should you care? This gives you more time to party. No, sir. I'm chained, sir, sir. Trust me, sir, sir. Please let me give the exams. No, Kunal. You are lying. I've given you a final warning. Do you remember that? Yes, sir. Do you remember I gave you a final warning? Yes, sir. Well, here's the decision. Kunal Regi कुनाल रेगे यू आर रस्टिकेटेड येस यू आर रस्टिकेटेड I love you. Beep. Beep. Beep. Beep. Beep. Beep. Beep. Beep. Beep. Beep. Beep. Beep. Beep. Beep. Beep. Beep.
